title: SfxPlan
description: User-selected SFX assignments with per-shot timing. Written by /api/sfx_save_all when the user clicks 'Save SFX Selections' in the SFX tab. Consumed by gen_render_plan.py (injected as sfx_plan_entries per shot) and render_video.py (mixed into the shot audio at the specified delay/trim).

saved_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the file was last written (e.g. '2026-03-12T10:00:00Z')

timing_format.description: Coordinate system for start_sec / end_sec. Always 'episode_absolute'.

sfx_entries.description: One entry per selected SFX, one per item_id. Multiple entries for the same shot_id are allowed (stack multiple SFX on one shot).

shot_id.description: Shot this SFX is assigned to (e.g. 'sh-sc01-sh01'). Must match a shot_id in the ShotList.

source_file.description: Absolute local path to the downloaded SFX audio file (MP3 or WAV). Written under {ep_dir}/assets/sfx/{item_id}/{item_id}.mp3 by sfx_save_all.

candidate_idx.description: Index into the sfx_search_results.json candidates[] array for this item_id. Used by the UI on reload to restore the selected candidate dropdown.

start_sec.description: Shot-relative delay in seconds: when to start playing this SFX within the shot. Applied as adelay in render_video.py.

end_sec.description: Shot-relative stop time in seconds. The SFX plays for (end_sec - start_sec) seconds. null or omitted means play the full clip from start_sec to natural end (capped at shot duration).

volume_db.description: Per-item dB offset on top of SFX_DB (-3). Range: -18..0.

duck_db.description: Additional attenuation, additive with volume_db. Range: -30..0.

fade_sec.description: Symmetric fade-in/out duration in seconds. Range: 0..3.

clip_id.description: Assigned cut clip id, e.g. 'sfx-sc01-sh01:1.20s-3.50s'. null = uncut.

clip_path.description: ep_dir-relative path to pre-trimmed WAV. null = uncut.

volume_db.description: Per cut-clip volume offset in dB. Negative = quieter, positive = louder. Range: -18..+18.
